ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage of the tournament */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., Field, Bat) */,
  "first_innings_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first innings */,
  "first_innings_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets in the first innings */,
  "second_innings_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second innings */,
  "second_innings_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets in the second innings */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "won_by" TEXT /* Method by which the match was won (e.g., Runs, Wickets) */,
  "player_of_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player of the match */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer in the match */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in the match */,
  "best_bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best bowler in the match */,
  "best_bowling_figure" TEXT /* Best bowling figure in the match (e.g., 3-6) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, Abandoned, Rain-affected) */,
  "man_of_the_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the man of the series (if applicable) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_top_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player_of_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_of_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_best_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_series_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue in terms of spectators */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., Grass, Artificial) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage (e.g., Quarterfinals, Semifinals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., Right-handed, Left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., Right-arm fast, Left-arm spin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "prize_money" INTEGER /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_tournaments" (
  "match_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-tournament association */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the match in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_tournaments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning number (1 or 2) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score in the inning */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets in the inning */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled in the inning */,
  "run_rate" REAL /* Run rate in the inning */,
  "dots" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls in the inning */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours scored in the inning */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes scored in the inning */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Number of extra runs in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Maiden overs bowled by the player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings taken by the player (if a wicket-keeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or highlight */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., Highlight, Analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Viewer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single match */,
  "best_bowling_figure" TEXT /* Best bowling figure in a single match */,
  "total_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of balls faced */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours scored */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes scored */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team history entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of ties */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single match */,
  "best_bowling_figure" TEXT /* Best bowling figure in a single match */,
  "total_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of balls faced by the team */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours scored by the team */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes scored by the team */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken by the team */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue history entry */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played at the venue */,
  "total_wins_team1" INTEGER /* Total number of wins for the first team */,
  "total_wins_team2" INTEGER /* Total number of wins for the second team */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_history_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
